title: MK44 1FD, B & W Waste Management Services Limited: environmental permit issued EPR/KP3196NL/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: B & W Waste Management Services Limited Installation name: Building 18 Twinwoods Business Park Permit number: EPR/KP3196NL  "
